class.name: GKLeaderboardSet
class.brief_description: Represents a Game Center leaderboard set.
class.description: [code skip-lint]GKLeaderboardSet[/code] groups related leaderboards in Game Center. Use [method load_leaderboard_sets] to fetch available sets, then [method load_leaderboards] to enumerate the boards inside a set.

method.name: load_image
method.description: Loads the image for this leaderboard set. The callback receives [code](Image image, Variant error)[/code].

method.name: load_leaderboard_sets
method.description: Loads available leaderboard sets. The callback receives [code](Array[GKLeaderboardSet] sets, Variant error)[/code].

method.name: load_leaderboards
method.description: Loads leaderboards that belong to this set. The callback receives [code](Array[GKLeaderboard] leaderboards, Variant error)[/code].

members.member: Group identifier used to associate related leaderboard sets.
Unique identifier for this leaderboard set.
